titleStmt.title: SII 20.70: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 70. (B.K. No. 104 of 1938-39.) YELIVĀḶ, KUNDGOL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into a wall of Kalamēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 33, Sarvadhāri, Āshāḍha, Amāvāsyā, Wednesday, solar eclipse. The solar eclipse occurred on Jyēshṭha amāvāsyā according to which the corresponding date would be A.D. 1108, June 10, Wednesday, f.d.t. ·15.
This damaged inscription seems to record a gift of three stalls to a deity (name lost) by Kēsiyaṇṇa in the presence of the Thousand Mahājanas of Kuṁduṁguḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprīthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipra
drārkkatāraṁ saluttamire © Antā bhūpēṁdraṁ niṣkaṁṭakaṁ sukhadināḷva bhūmiyoḷ . . vritta . haraha The letterstāraṁ are written below the line.
nadiṁ keṟeyārave vāpikūpadiṁ baridaḷavaṭṭu tōrppa dvijavarggada kēriya bīdiyoppadiṁ taretaṁ
vaḍedaṁgaḍi vāravadhūgrihāḷiyiṁ karamatisēbyamā dōrppa duguḷaṁ pogartteyoḷ .
da ninādadiṁ sakaḷaśāstravinōdadharmmadoṁdu cārukaviteyaṁ kavigaḷmeṟevoṁdu bhēdadi
daradiṁde tatvavidaroḷnegaḻdātmaja javadoḷ tāṁ prabhu kuṁduṁguḷaṁ ne
gartteyoḷ . Ā kuṁduṁguḷa mahājana sāsirakāntābhāvasamasta vidyeyoḷsu
vṛttateyoḷbhūvaḷeyadoḷadhika pāsirvvar . Antā mahājanadoḷage . vri .
dānavinōdi satyapara Āśritakalpamahīja yā rakṣitaṁ sakaḷamaṁgaḷalakṣaṇayu
ktanendoḍī mānavaroḷpā dēvavaduge ḻdanalte sale kāśyapagō
trajanappa cikkaṇaṁ . Āḍuva ṭṭaṇakō ḍisiye samastaka
daḷvaṭṭaṇa citradiniḷdano sādhyamāyi
vyavahāradoḷaṁ vibhu cikkimayyana . kaṁda . legama jāta
samana [.] Ādaṁ bhāvipudī bhūtaḷado . vritta . Ā vibhugaṁ mahā
tigamutsavadeyyaru putrarāda vibhu nāṇimayya sadbhāva
nappa gōpati sudhārmika kēśava ṇaṁ yaṁ negaṟdarssu
r . Antayvaroḷagaṁ . vritta . rāmakṟiṣṇa
lade pāṇḍavaroḷnegarttevetta
kaḷakēśavadāsiyaṇnamo
ramanartti yaṁ mōḍadi
© © © © kēsidāsivaṇijōtkriṣṭama
Antā yirvvaroḷage . dēgulamanaṟavaṁṭige keṟeyuṁ
tānāgadumārppa sahajaguṇa raṁtasamarttha
vūḻḍiḍuvantāṁ maru manamu keyya
dīnārtthigaṁ baḍavarggeṟedarggittu kīrttivaḍeda śrīsvayaṁbhū va
soḍarggaḷanartthiyiṁde naṁdāvigaḷa mappa nakharēśvaradēvaranartthiyiṁdamī rūḍiya daṇḍanāthavibhu mu
ddinadēvarigartthiyiṁdavammāṁḍidanalligalli soḍaralli nivēdyamanoppe kēśava . kaṁda . manamosedu
maṁtrimārttaṇḍana dēguladalli kalpa caritaṁ kēśavaniṁbine māḍisidaṁ bisiṣṭa
mene jagadoḷage . bālāgnihōtri mantavara jīvanōpāyamumaṁ pālipude besana
madaṟiṁ lōlupa manadali ndaḷisi nīranuṇbantiralintasa
daḷa kallayageṟeyaṁ rāja nīnīgaḷ . Ātana satiyoḷguṇamumā pati taṁ The letter mā is engraved below the line.
dharmmakkanusāṭhi mahābratiyu laccikabbe vanitāratna . vritta . dānavidhānamavi
budharalli salannadānamanne kēśiyaṇnanēnmānisa dānasura si
ndhutaḍāgasuvistara śrī nelasiḻda māḷkeyoḷumāḍisi yoppi tōṟugu . kaṁda . Aṁgaḍi mūṟaṁ dhanada na śriṁgā
raṁ berasi tōrppa bhaṁḍāramanalkaṇgesedoppiṟe māḍisi gaṁgeyageṟegittanalle kēśavarāja . Akṣēyavādanūnaguṇayuta
nakṣayanidhiyenisi tōrppa mūṟaṁgaḍiyaṁ rakṣisi gaṁgeyageṟegiṁtakṣayaphaḷamāge koṭṭa kēśavarāja . vacana .
Intu baṁda nijadaṁśāvaḷīsarōjabhāskaranuṁ mūvarttircchāsirapādaprakṣāḷanōdaka pavitritagātranuṁ sāsirvvara supu
tranumenisida śrīmaccikkamayyaṁgaḷa kēsiyaṇnaṁ . svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 33 neya sarvvadhāri samvatsaradāṣā
ḍadamāvāsye budhavāra sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu . svastyanēkaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkritamukha kamaḷavinirggatavēdavēdāṁgōpā
stānēkasmṛtipurāṇavāgbhūṣaṇarjjapaniyamahōmasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānaparāyaṇarvvidita
dyāpāragar ṣaṭkarmmaniratar saptasōmasaṁsthāvabhritāvagāhanapavitrōttamāṁgar dvātriṁśatsahasrasamayāgra
rēkavākyarahitavidhvaṁsakarāśritajanakalpavrikṣar śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjarar duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭa pratipā
duṁguḷadūroḍeyapramukhamahājanaṁ sāsirvvara sannidhānadoḷ sāsirvvara tottu cikkimayya
yageṟege māḍisi koṭṭaṁgaḍi mūṟu Ā Aṁgaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu
ya baḍagaṇa poreyalu Ā kēriya
māḍisi koṭṭaṁgaḍi
dharmmamaṁ sāsirvvara sa
yāge Argghyatīrttha
naḷidātanā kṣētra
vā yō harēti va
ma .
Digital edition of SII 20.70 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
